data.title: [UPDATE] test_ticket_llm_format.py: update import from importlib path to ticket_reducer.llm_format package
data.description: Update tests/scripts/test_ticket_llm_format.py to import to_llm from ticket_reducer.llm_format instead of the current importlib.util.spec_from_file_location dance. Replace lines 21-32 (SCRIPT_PATH + spec_from_file_location pattern) with: from ticket_reducer.llm_format import to_llm, shorten_comment, shorten_dep. All existing test assertions remain unchanged — this is purely an import path update. testing_mode: UPDATE.
